holdings.infoBox: RSPM is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nucor stock at 5.48%, Steel Dynamics at 5.47%, PPG Industries at 4.20%, Freeport-McMoRan at 4.19%, and International Flavors & Fragrances at 4.13%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Materials ETF (RSPM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Equal Weighted / Materials index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US materials companies in the S&P 500. RSPM was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
